response.step_by_step_log: 1. Monitored audio for the duration of the video. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists solely of conversational speech from the VTuber and the ambient sound of cooking. 3. Concluded no vocal music is present, therefore no lyrics or song metadata to resolve.
response.global_summary: The video features a Japanese VTuber talking to her audience while cooking zucchini in a frying pan. There is no vocal music throughout the entire duration of the clip.

scenes.description: A VTuber is talking while frying zucchini slices in a pan. No vocal music is present.
